cases.prompt: /laravel-agent:laravel-livewire ProductTable with search, sort, and pagination
cases.expect: forks the laravel-livewire agent and scaffolds a Livewire 3 table component class + Blade view with wire:model.live search, sorting, and WithPagination

cases.prompt: /laravel-agent:laravel-livewire CheckoutForm with validation and a confirm modal
cases.expect: forks the laravel-livewire agent and produces a Livewire form with #[Validate] rules and an Alpine modal via @entangle
